title: National Alliance ready to form new government, Progressives say they stay
summary_full: Ilze Indriksone, leader of the National Alliance and a member of the Saeima, is ready to form a "national security leadership." Indriksone announced this on the social media platform "X".
summary_public: Ilze Indriksone, leader of the National Alliance and a member of the Saeima, is ready to form a "national security leadership." Indriksone announced this on the social media platform "X".
